roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
ADDTNL P&A TO SUPPLMNT THE PPLS OPPO TO DEFTS MOT TO DISM FILED
DA MOT TO OPPOSE DISMISS FILED
/CAL:APD PROGRESS REPORT/DEF: IS DOING WELL PER THE ADULT PROBATION OFFICER'S PROGRESS REPORT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: NOFURTHER COURT APPEARANCES REQUIRED/

/AJW/X: AS TO COUNT 1, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO 3 YEARS STATE PRISON, UPPER TERM,/X: AS TO COUNT 2, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO 3 YEARS STATE PRISON,UPPER TERM, CONCURRENT,/X: AS TO COUNT 3, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO 3 YEARS STATE PRISON, UPPER TERM, CONCURRENT,/X: TOTAL 3 YEARS STATE PRISON,/AJW/CH1:SP 3Y:U:ESS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 17D/CTS:17/DNACOMP/STATES/X: THE DEFENDANT'S DRIVER'S LICENSE SHALL BE REVOKED FOR 4 YEARS, CONCURRENT WITH DMV,/DEF:SHALL PARTICIPATE IN AA MEETINGS AT A MINIMAL OF 3 TIMES PER WEEK/ /LVAL/LCHEM/WS/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/X: THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A BASEFINE OF $595 PLUS $1799 IN ASSESSMENTS FOR A TOTAL FINE AMOUNT OF $2,394,00/VF4:200/VF1/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/1463ALC/X: AS TO MISDEMEANOR COUNTS 4, 5, AND 6, DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE 17 DAYS IN THE COUNTY JAIL, WITH 17 DAYS CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED,/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/BE/CONTD: PROGRESS REPORT ON 08-10-12/

/CAL:RECEIPT OF PRE PLEA REPORT/X:THE COURT RECEIVED THE PRE-PLEA REPORT,//TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 1,2, 3, 4, AND 5/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION  PLEA OPEN TO THE COURT /

/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION TO DISMISS/ARG&SUB/X: DEFENSE MOTION TO DISMISS IS DENIED,/CTORD: THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT TO PREPARE A PRE-PLEA REPORT//PRES: 06-26-12/CONTD: RECEIPT OF PRE-PLEA REPORT/DOP/X: THE COURT FURTHERORDERS THE DEFENDANT'S OTHER CASE #2336882 ON CALENDAR 06-26-12 AND A SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT TO BE PREPARED IN THAT CASE/

/CAL:TO SET PRELIM HEARING/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO DISMISS, HAVING BEEN PREVIOUSLY DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, THE COURT WILL ENTERTAIN SAID MOTION,/CONTD:DEFENSE MOTION TO DISMISS/DOP/X:COUNSEL TO SUBMIT THEIR LETTER BRIEF NO LATER THAN 05-21-12,/TE:HALF DAY/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:PEOPLE ORALLY AMEND COMPLAINT TO REFLECT 2010 AS TO ALLCOUNTS/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/ STWPX/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
CONTD TO BE SET, DOP/CONTD:TO SET/DOP/X:HALF DAY EST/
/CAL:PHC/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO DISMISS FILED/CONTD:DEFENSE MOTION TO DISMISHEARING/DOP/
